name: Caramel Corn
recipeInstructions:
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Combine popcorn and almonds in a large microwave-safe bowl.
2. In a 4-cup microwave-safe measuring cup, combine brown sugar, margarine, corn syrup, and salt.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes; stir.
4. Microwave on HIGH for 2 to 3 minutes or until the mixture comes to a rolling boil. Stir in baking soda; mix well. Pour over popcorn and almonds; toss until coated.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes. Immediately spread on foil or waxed paper to cool.
CONVENTIONAL OVEN DIRECTIONS:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F (120°C).
2. Spread popcorn in a single layer in a 15x10x1 inch baking pan; sprinkle almonds over the popcorn.
3. In a large saucepan, combine brown sugar, margarine, corn syrup, and salt. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
4. Boil for 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Stir in baking soda; mix well. Pour over popcorn and almonds; toss until coated.
5. Bake at 250°F (120°C) for 15 minutes; stir. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes. Immediately spread on foil or waxed paper to cool.
To toast almonds:
1. Spread almonds in a thin layer in a microwave-safe pie pan. Microwave on high for 5 to 7 minutes, or until light golden brown, stirring frequently.
2. Alternatively, spread almonds on a cookie sheet; bake at 350°F (175°C) for 5 to 10 minutes, or until light golden brown, stirring occasionally.
